calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioners: Myra E. Diaz and Rafael Diaz parentes of minor, present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of minor's name to Raphael Diaz Jr.
Decree signed in open court.
